title: The Garden Awakens Panorama
description: The Creaking has gotta be one of the weirdest & scariest mobs that there are in this game. But as scary as one may be? It looks mighty nice as a trophy for your main screen!
body:
# It sins. It resins. And it sees you.
The Creaking has gotta be one of the weirdest & scariest mobs that there are in this game.

But as scary as one may be? It looks mighty nice as a trophy for your main screen!

![The Garden Awakens Panorama](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74a073b0ed9821f7f70d3924ea45f41bcacf341e.webp)

# Features
- Single prerendered panorama of the creaking scene for your main menu

# Not your cup of tea?
Feel free to check out [other panoramas](https://modrinth.com/user/Lumora) that I made for you!
